title: No error is given when incorrect timezone value is specified for a timetz column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TIMETZ_TBL (f1 time(2), f2 varchar(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('00:01:00', 'Another Valid Timezone');
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('00:02:00', 'Yet Another Valid Timezone');
SELECT f1, f2, CAST(f1 AS CHAR(30)) AS time_str FROM TIMETZ_TBL WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect timezone value for timetz column
